title: Arrhenatherum oligostachyum

intro: Arrhenatherum oligostachyum, also known as Chinese oat grass, is a perennial grass native to China and parts of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
